_comment: Copy this file to config.json (same folder) and edit the paths for your server. Windows paths use double backslashes.
_bracket: Weekly nicknamed-Pal popularity bracket. Set bracketEnabled true to run it. voteTalliesUrl must serve the running tallies as {"<matchId>":{"a":N,"b":N}} - leave it "" and every match resolves by coin-toss instead. Draft is Sunday at bracketDraftHour local; rounds close Tue/Thu/Sat 00:00.
_broadcast: Send in-game announcements from the dashboard. Off unless BOTH broadcastPollUrl and broadcastBoxToken are set. pal-broadcast.ps1 polls <broadcastPollUrl>/broadcast-pending for queued messages and shows them via the server's LOCAL REST announce API - the REST API itself is never exposed to the internet. broadcastBoxToken is a SECRET: config.json is gitignored, keep it that way. Messages are capped at 200 chars and broadcastMaxPerMinute, so a leaked token cannot spam players.
